name: x-intelligence-engine
description: Private intelligence engine over the official X API with Claude screening and a remote MCP server.

scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter @xie/web build && wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist
scripts.deploy: pnpm deploy:api && pnpm deploy:pipeline && pnpm deploy:web
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply xie-db --local --config apps/api-worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply xie-db --remote --config apps/api-worker/wrangler.jsonc
